calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-02-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Court orders sanctions vacated in open court. Case is dismissed pursuant to Government Code 68608(b). JUDGE GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk JLee. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-12-2019 Continued To Apr-30-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to Apr-30-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. This case is subject to dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b) if there is no appearance on the next hearing date and compliance. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-12-2018 Continued To Mar-12-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
Dalila Reyes Cabrera, plaintiff appearing on her own behalf, together with court certified Spanish Interpreter Shannon Raintree. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to MAR-12-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
